name: Orange Town
description: Orange Town was once a prosperous trading town known for its orange groves and peaceful atmosphere. When Buggy the Clown and his pirates arrived, they terrorized the population and destroyed much of the town. It's where Nami first encountered Luffy and temporarily allied with him against Buggy.
history: Orange Town thrived as a agricultural and trading hub for generations. When news of Buggy's approach reached the town, most citizens evacuated, leaving only the stubborn Mayor Boodle and a few brave souls. Buggy occupied the town and began looting it systematically. Chouchou, a loyal dog, remained to guard his deceased owner's pet food shop. The town was liberated when Luffy and Nami defeated Buggy and his crew, though significant damage remained.
culture: Before Buggy's attack, Orange Town had a simple, agricultural culture centered around orange farming and honest trade. The citizens valued hard work and community bonds. The town's pet culture was strong, with many families keeping animals. After liberation, citizens slowly returned to rebuild their beloved home, maintaining their resilient spirit.
transportation: Small trading ships dock at the harbor. Within town, travel is by foot or cart. The orange groves surround the town's perimeter.

quirks: Pet food shop is a town landmark
Mayor's determination to protect his town alone

notablePeople.name: Nami
notablePeople.description: The cunning navigator who was stealing from pirates to buy back her village. She temporarily allied with Luffy against Buggy.

notablePeople.name: Buggy the Clown
notablePeople.description: The flashy pirate with the Chop-Chop Fruit who terrorized Orange Town. He has a violent hatred of anyone insulting his red nose.

notablePeople.name: Mayor Boodle
notablePeople.description: The stubborn elderly mayor who refused to abandon Orange Town despite Buggy's threat, willing to die defending his home.

notablePeople.name: Chouchou
notablePeople.description: The incredibly loyal dog who guarded his deceased owner's pet food shop against all threats, even Buggy's crew.

notablePeople.name: Mohji
notablePeople.role: Buggy Pirates Chief of Staff / Beast Tamer
notablePeople.description: Buggy's first mate who commands Richie the lion. He attacked Chouchou's shop but was defeated by Luffy.

notablePeople.name: Cabaji
notablePeople.role: Buggy Pirates Chief of Staff / Acrobat
notablePeople.description: The unicycling swordsman of Buggy's crew who fought Zoro using dirty tricks and acrobatic maneuvers.

notablePeople.name: Richie
notablePeople.description: Mohji's large, cowardly lion who destroyed Chouchou's shop but was defeated by Luffy.

subLocations.name: Pet Food Shop
subLocations.description: The small shop that Chouchou's owner ran before passing away. Chouchou guards it with his life as his owner's treasure.
notableFeatures: Store of pet food and supplies

subLocations.name: Town Square
subLocations.description: The central area of Orange Town where Buggy set up his base and displayed his Buggy Ball cannon.
notableFeatures: Battle site between Luffy and Buggy

subLocations.name: Orange Groves
subLocations.description: The orchards surrounding Orange Town that give it its name and primary industry.

subLocations.name: Harbor
subLocations.description: The small dock where Buggy's ship was anchored and where trading vessels normally arrived.

items.name: Buggy's Bara Bara no Mi
items.description: The Chop-Chop Fruit that allows Buggy to split his body into pieces and control them independently.

items.name: Grand Line Map
items.description: A map of the Grand Line that Nami stole from Buggy's treasury.

items.name: Buggy Ball
items.description: Buggy's special cannonball that creates massive explosions, used to terrorize the town.

items.name: Pet Food Shop
items.description: To Chouchou, his owner's shop is the most precious treasure in the world.

factions.name: Orange Town Citizens
factions.description: The townsfolk who evacuated when Buggy arrived, slowly returning after his defeat.

factions.name: Buggy Pirates
factions.description: The flashy circus-themed pirates who terrorized the town for treasure.

events: Nami steals from Buggy and meets Luffy
Mohji and Richie destroy the pet food shop
Buggy is defeated and blown away

quickFacts: Home of the legendary guard dog Chouchou
Where Nami stole her first Grand Line map
Destroyed but rebuilt by determined citizens

videos.title: Luffy vs Buggy the Clown
videos.description: The battle between Luffy and the Chop-Chop Fruit user in Orange Town.

videos.title: Chouchou's Loyalty
videos.description: The touching story of the dog who would protect his owner's treasure shop no matter what.
